data.value: Key {0} is deprecated and automatically removed from model.

data.value: Property '{0}' cannot be converted to a {1} for value: {2}. Line: {3}

data.value: Section '{0}' has an unknown header and cannot be parsed. Line: {1}

data.value: Initial field data file does not exist: {0}.

data.value: Property '{0}' can only be {1} when '{2}' is {3}.

data.name: Property_0_contains_value_1_but_this_is_not_supported_for_quantity_2_
data.value: Property '{0}' contains value '{1}', but this is not supported for quantity '{2}'.
